briefs.title: BC Development Cost Charge Instalment Rules Tightened for Developers Starting January 2026
briefs.summary: BC is changing how developers pay Development Cost Charges (fees charged by transit authorities when land is developed). Starting Jan 1, 2026, instalment payers must pay 25% upfront at permit approval and the rest within 4 years or shortly after occupancy permits are issued.
briefs.action_required: If you pay development cost charges in instalments, prepare to pay 25% upfront at permit approval from Jan 1, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Development Cost Charge instalment rules take effect

briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Transportation & Logistics
